name: USS Willis (DE 395)
events: 15 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with ships from Task Group 22.3; escort carrier USS Bogue (T/Capt. G.J. Dufek, USN, also COMTASKGR 22.3) and the destroyer escorts USS Haverfield (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Mathews, Jr., USNR, with COMCORTDIV 51, T/Cdr. T.S. Lank, USN on board), USS Willis (Lt.Cdr. G.R. Atterbury, USNR) and USS Cockrill (Lt.Cdr. S. Farnham, USNR).

31 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda with several ships from Task Group 22.2. This were the destroyer escorts USS Willis (Lt.Cdr. G.R. Atterbury, USNR), USS Wilhoite (Lt. R.W. Whalen, USNR) and USS Cockrill (Lt.Cdr. S. Farnham, USNR).
